search_query: Is there a torch.scan equivalent to JAX's lax.scan? I need a functional scan for my RNN that works with torch.compile.

results.title: Is there an equivalent of jax.lax.scan (eg in torch.func)?
The Jax primitive jax.lax.conv_transpose result does not match the result of torch.nn.functional.con
Question regarding performance of jax.lax.scan · jax-ml jax · Discussion #16106 · GitHub
